page: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadv6 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this server features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores with multithreading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The processor is supported by a cache hierarchy including 32 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

The instance includes 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. In benchmark evaluations, the E64ads_v6 demonstrates top-tier performance in single-core CPU stress tests and multi-core Geekbench scores. Memory performance is robust, with read-only small block cached bandwidth reaching 4863.62 GB/sec and write large block uncached bandwidth at 108.83 GB/sec. However, uncached large block read bandwidth is moderate at 154.13 GB/sec. The system excels in data-intensive tasks, showing strong results in Passmark database operations and Redis SET operations, which reached 89.03 million operations per second.

Given its substantial memory capacity and high-speed local storage, the E64ads_v6 is highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that require rapid local data access without the overhead of external storage. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, software compilation, and medium-scale language model inference. The dedicated CPU allocation and strong multi-threaded decompression capabilities make it an effective choice for enterprise-level ETL pipelines and data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadv6 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. Operating at 3.7 GHz, it features 64 vCPUs (32 physical cores) and 512.0 GB of RAM, delivering a high 8.0 GB of memory per core. The instance includes 3780 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. Benchmark results show top-tier performance in single-core CPU stress tests and multi-core Geekbench processing, alongside strong memory write bandwidth and database operation speeds. While uncached large-block read bandwidth is average, its overall hardware profile offers excellent resource density for memory-heavy applications. This server is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, software compilation, and data-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, massive RAM capacity, and high-speed local storage for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 64-vCPU AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz.
Equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB per core.
Includes 3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.
Top-tier performance in single-core stress tests and multi-core Geekbench benchmarks.
Strong database operations and high-throughput Redis SET performance.
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data-intensive ETL pipelines.
